series_metadata.series_description: List of lower and higher authority decisions mailed to all interested parties on a given day. This list certifies that on the date and time shown on the list, decisions of the U.C. Board of Review were enclosed in envelopes bearing the interested party''s names and addresses and submitted to the mailroom for affixing of proper postage and deposited in the mail on the date shown on the certified list. Record of all Decisions mailed. Includes a daily listing of: appeal docket number; claimants name, employers, and addresses; total number of cases, and total number of actual mailings; signatures of Commission representative and ODJFS Mail Services representative.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office and in records center 3 years
